dependencies: 
- name: microservice1   # replace this according your services' names. This chart depends on service 'microservices'.   version: ^12   # replace this according your semantic versions which follows Semantic Versioning Scheme. This will allow updates and new features without breaking backward compatibility for users who depend on our release/version of the chart or its dependencies
- name: microservice3   
  version: "~5"      # make sure to set up a stable semver range here, so that till semantic versions get deprecated (major.minor), you can safely use these services' names in your upgrade procedure for each new release/version of the chart as per requirements and without breaking backward compatibility
